# Tutorial Starter

Use this when drafting a learning-oriented tutorial.

```markdown
# Build [outcome]

## What you will learn

- [Skill]
- [Skill]

## Before you start

- [Assumed knowledge]
- [Tools or access required]

## Step 1 - [first milestone]

[Explain why this matters and what success looks like.]

## Step 2 - [next milestone]

[Build on the previous step.]

## Next steps

- [Variation]
- [Follow-up guide]
```
